channel.title: flove making-of — design questions
channel.description: New design design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should flove apps have a standardized footer?
item.description:
• Standardized footer — All apps share the same footer component. Consistent, less individuality. • App-specific footer — Each app designs its own footer. More creative, less consistent. • Minimal footer — Just version + license, no links. Clean, unobtrusive.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Minimal footer
